user_message: Robert Singh at Blue Yonder Airlines just sent this. Help me investigate the decline.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-23 09:19 EST
Subject: forecast prep - Action Required

Just checking in on the forecast prep proposal. Our CIO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
Date: 2024-02-23 12:22 EST
Subject: Follow-up: forecast prep Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with forecast prep. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-09 15:29 EST
Subject: URGENT: forecast prep Issue at Blue Yonder Airlines

Our team encountered some challenges with forecast prep. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Blue Yonder Airlines: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-G trap (Recommends outreach to former employee at old address); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-G failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-G failure mode (Recommends outreach to former employee at old address)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct forecast prep decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-G -- Recommends outreach to former employee at old address
